# CWE-270 — Privilege Context Switching Error (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-270-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

type ctxKey string

const effectiveUserKey ctxKey = "effective_user"

// Vulnerable: elevates to maintenance user but never restores caller context.
func RunMaintenanceSweep(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	ctx := context.WithValue(r.Context(), effectiveUserKey, "root")
	r = r.WithContext(ctx)
	_ = r.Context().Value(effectiveUserKey)
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte(`{"done":true}`))
}
